column6: Who set up the fire just before you came here?
Looks like someone had been here before. It is a jacket for male.
That person was attacked by something unknown. He did not have time to get his belongings and ran away.
The person left the journal he wrote during his days in this forest. It mentioned:
Does the knife belongs to the person who was attacked or someone else that we do not know about? Is he/she the one who set up the camp fire?
The person died. But who set up the grave and put flowers there?
